title: FrugalFinding
description: One decidable over-engineering finding from a frugal.review run (agency/capabilities/frugal; Spec 348). Composed from analyze.quality on an in-scope file: records file:line, the rule code, the over-engineering tag (delete/shrink/yagni), and the full message, so the WHOLE judgment is durable in the graph (a query, not a dropped wire tail). The review's token-bounded return shows only the top-N; every finding is recorded here.

file.description: Path of the file the finding is in.

tag.description: The over-engineering tag (delete | shrink | yagni | stdlib | native), mapped from the analyze rule code.

rule.description: The analyze.quality rule code the finding came from (e.g. Q001).

message.description: The full finding message from analyze.quality (stored in full, never truncated).
